title: Saudi Arabia delivers Arab Group statement on Gaza at UN Security Council

snapshot.title: Saudi Arabia delivers Arab Group statement on Gaza at UN Security Council
snapshot.description: NEW YORK: Saudi Arabia, speaking on behalf of the Arab Group, reaffirmed support for a two-state solution and called for an immediate and sustained flow of humanitarian aid into Gaza during a UN Security Council emergency session on the humanitarian situation in the Palestinian enclave, the Saudi Press Agency reported. In a statement delivered by Saudi Arabia's Permanent
snapshot.author: Arab News
